componentDescription: This component displays text content with customizable styling for appearance, emphasis, and hierarchy.

children.description: Declare `children` prop, which is of type `React.ReactNode` to accept any element that can be rendered by React, like a string, number, or JSX.

heading.description: Optional `heading` prop allowing to specify the heading level, which should be one of the predefined `Headings` type.

isItalic.description: Optional `isItalic` boolean prop to determine if the label text should be italicized.

isStriked.description: Optional `isStriked` boolean prop to determine if the label text should have a strikethrough.

isUnderlined.description: Optional `isUnderlined` boolean prop to determine if the label text should be underlined.

size.description: Optional `size` prop that can either be one of the predefined `Sizes` type or a custom `number` size value.

weight.description: Optional `weight` prop that defines the font weight of the label using the predefined `TextWeights` type.
